verdicts.reason: All specified correctness concerns and resolutions from the prompt have been verified and implemented correctly.
All user input is properly escaped before rendering, and the CSP is restrictive. LocalStorage usage is explicitly disclaimed per project constraints.
All specified UI/accessibility improvements and tap-target fixes have been implemented, and the new status tracker feature is clearly presented.
The Letter Status Tracker feature is well-documented in the AI prompt and its UI elements are clearly named and discoverable.
The Letter Status Tracker provides practical, recurring utility for managing official correspondence lifecycle within the tool, addressing a common administrative need.
verdicts.evidence: Users frequently need to track the status of documents (Draft, Signed, Transmitted, Replied) in any organization handling formal correspondence. Integrating this directly into the drafting tool reduces context switching and provides a centralized, visual overview that enhances workflow efficiency, making it a valuable tool for daily or frequent use.

verdicts.reason: The Letter Status Tracker reinforces naval-scribe's identity as a comprehensive, reliable utility by adding practical workflow management without compromising its core functional aesthetic.
All documented lessons, including those from prior escalations, have been addressed and are in compliance with the deliverable.
